sigWerErrors.reason: The insertion of 'bir' (a/an) does not significantly change the meaning of the sentence.
'Hesap' (account) and 'SSK' (social security institution) refer to completely different things, changing the meaning of the request.
The insertion of 'İş' (work) changes the subject of the sentence, making it incoherent with the original meaning.
